name: downloads-cleaner
title: Downloads Cleaner
description: Tag outdated files in a folder with Finder labels.
author: wybxc

commands.name: tag-outdated-downloads
commands.title: Tag Outdated Downloads
commands.description: Tag files older than a threshold based on access time.

preferences.name: downloadFolderPath
preferences.title: Download Folder Path
preferences.description: Folder to scan. Supports ~ for home directory.

preferences.name: timeThresholdDays
preferences.title: Time Threshold (Days)
preferences.description: Files older than this value will be tagged.

preferences.name: finderTagColor
preferences.title: Finder Tag Color
preferences.description: Tag color applied to outdated files.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
